benefits.description: Ton of energy at lowest dosage (0.2mg)
Energy boost returns after a few months break

side_effects.description: Eventually stopped producing effects after titration to around 1mg

protocol_notes: Started at 0.2mg with significant energy effects; titrated up to 0.5mg maintenance dose, eventually tried approaching 1mg; took a break of a few months and energy effects returned; believes effects are related to mitochondrial damage level; notes that dosing protocols online are somewhat arbitrary and based on old information
